body:
I think this fixes the parcel initial condition for the liquid only example. Doesn't really change the results, but it consistently treats the vapor and liquid

Closes #230

labels.description: We should be doing something else
labels.name: Bikeshedding :bike: :house:

title: Clean up liquid parcel initial condition

title: RH based water activity

body:
We are now using RootSolvers in the P3 scheme. It can do the same thing as Roots, and we will have one less dependency to worry about. 

Closing https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/issues/228

Also updating the documenter. I think the main thing is `makedocs(..., bib) -> makedocs(..., plugins=[bib])`

labels.description: We should be doing something else
labels.name: Bikeshedding :bike: :house:

title: switch to using RootSolvers in docs

body:
Adds a liquid only parcel example with a gamma (`(r) = A r exp(-\lambada r)`) size distribution of droplets.

@amylu00 - lmk if you agree that this makes sense
title: parcel with gamma size distribution of droplets
